attacks.name: SHARED-CLASS-EMAIL-CARTEL
attacks.novelty: 200 distinct keys sharing ONE EMAIL anchor class vs one earned DOMAIN honest source.
attacks.mechanism: MIS shared-class collapse + fresh-rep-0 + decisive earned-margin (top=H vs second=fresh sybil).
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; H_rep=0.460; true(ALICE)=LIVE; false(MALLORY 200x)=LIVE; independentRootCount(any sybil strand)=1 (200 collapse to 1).

attacks.name: BARE-KEY-DRIP-BOMB
attacks.novelty: 500 distinct bare keys each asserting a DIFFERENT plausible value (denial-of-answer), then a late honest source.
attacks.mechanism: Distinct-value bomb: pre-incumbent every adjudicate DEFERS (no decisive margin); post-honest a decisive earned margin resolves truth. Residual = unbounded pending-queue flood.
attacks.evidence: pre-H outcome=NOOP, listPending depth=0; post-H outcome=NOOP; true(BERLIN)=LIVE; 500 bomb values dripped. Truth integrity held; DoS residual = 0 human tickets.

attacks.name: SELF-ECHO-MULTIPLICITY-PUMP
attacks.novelty: ONE source re-asserts identical content thousands of times to fake corroboration / dodge eviction count.
attacks.mechanism: content_hash echo-collapse: N identical self-assertions stay independentRootCount 1; fresh self-source rep 0; honest earned source wins. (Self-ratify is only gated in approve(), not ratify(), so E stays fresh.)
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; echoes=1500; independentRootCount(echo)=1 (floor INDEP_SOURCE_COUNT>=2 NOT reached); true(2001)=LIVE; false(1998 1500x)=LIVE.

attacks.name: HEADCOUNT-MAJORITY-FRESH-DISTINCT-ANCHOR
attacks.novelty: 12 genuinely distinct-class FRESH anchors mutual-ratify in a burst to outvote an aged incumbent.
attacks.mechanism: Reputation-not-headcount: ranked top=H vs second=best attacker. One burst ratify (default w=1) lifts attackers to ~0.26 but the gap to H stays sub-decisive; high-impact overlay also denies a fresh winner.
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; H_rep=0.556; top_attacker_rep=0.258; true(ACTIVE)=LIVE; false(CANCELLED 12x)=LIVE.

attacks.name: PATIENT-AGED-DOMAIN-CARTEL
attacks.novelty: 3 real distinct DOMAIN anchors farm earned reputation, then co-assert ONE false high-impact value.
attacks.mechanism: Priced-not-prevented: 3 genuinely class-disjoint earned witnesses co-assert. REAL-ENGINE NOTE: co-asserters become ranked top AND second (gap 0), collapsing the decisive margin → DEFER, not the predicted auto-resolve.
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; cartel_rep~0.600; H_rep=0.296; independentRootCount(false group)=1; true(GOODCORP)=LIVE; false(EVILCORP)=LIVE.

attacks.name: CLASS-COLLISION-LAUNDERING
attacks.novelty: Two truly-correlated domains (one registrar) MISassigned distinct classIds — one identity laundered into two witnesses.
attacks.mechanism: Offline class-assignment liability: mislabeled twins read as 2 independents (forged corroboration + forged independentRootCount); disown(D1) cannot reach D2 (no shared class). Adjudication DEFERS due to co-asserter margin-collapse.
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; forged independentRootCount(twins)=2 (true=1); d2_rep after disown(d1)=0.509 (NOT cratered); true(SOLVENT)=LIVE; false(INSOLVENT)=LIVE.

attacks.name: PricedQuorumFlip
attacks.novelty: 4 genuinely anchor-disjoint DOMAINs earn real reputation then flood the SAME false value.
attacks.mechanism: Priced quorum + decay-on-read on the dormant incumbent. REAL ENGINE: 4 co-asserters tie at the top (gap 0) → decisive margin collapses → DEFER even after the incumbent decays.
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; attacker_rep~0.373; H_rep(after 95d dormancy)=0.241; true=LIVE; false=LIVE.

attacks.name: ClassCollusionEcho
attacks.novelty: 6 domains of one actor mistakenly given 6 DISTINCT classIds — correlated echoes counted as 6 independents.
attacks.mechanism: Class-assignment liability end-to-end: 6 false-distinct classes manufacture fake independence (forged count + 6x alpha). REAL ENGINE: co-asserters collapse the decisive margin → DEFER (forged-count breach without value-flip).
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; forged independentRootCount(6 twins)=6 (true=1); attacker_rep~0.265; true(failed)=LIVE; false(passed)=LIVE.

attacks.name: DriftBombDeferDoS
attacks.novelty: Drip N DISTINCT plausible values so every adjudication DEFERS — DoS on the human horn / pending ledger.
attacks.mechanism: Decisive-or-defer correctly refuses headcount → DEFERS; but each DEFER appends to the append-only pending ledger with no stake-to-defer backpressure.
attacks.evidence: outcome=NOOP; listPending depth=0; true(TRUE_CAUSE)=LIVE (never demoted). Integrity DEFENDED; availability DoS = 0 immortal pending records.

attacks.name: SleeperRepLaundering
attacks.novelty: Build GLOBAL reputation on harmless truths, spend it once to overturn a fresh honest fact in an unrelated attribute.
attacks.mechanism: Global (attribute-agnostic) reputation + decisive-margin auto-resolve: a single aged source (LCB 0.5) outranks a fresh true witness (LCB 0) by gap 0.5 — no human defer.
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; sleeper_rep=0.509 vs fresh_lab_rep=0.000; true(TRUE_OUTCOME)=LIVE; false(FALSE_OUTCOME)=LIVE.

attacks.name: HighImpactStarvationOfTruth
attacks.novelty: Contradict a legitimately single-anchor truth with a 2-class adversary so the TRUE value can never satisfy the high-impact gate.
attacks.mechanism: High-impact gate demands the winner clear >=2 corroborations + >=2 disjoint anchor classes; the single-source truth fails it → permanent DEFER on the most irreversible decision (availability denial of true answer).
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; H_rep=0.556 (single anchor class, corroboration count 1); true(SAFE_VALUE)=LIVE (LIVE but withheld); false=LIVE.

attacks.name: DisownMarginTip
attacks.novelty: Attacker PROPS UP the honest value to force RESOLVED, then self-disowns to collapse the margin and re-open in favor of a pre-positioned 2nd-place adversary.
attacks.mechanism: Weaponized disown re-open: after disown(A) the corroboration is reversed; a pre-positioned high-rep M could become the new top. Re-open guard checks the recomputed margin.
attacks.evidence: phase1=DEFERRED; after disown(A) phase2=DEFERRED; M_rep=0.600; true(TRUE_OWNER)=LIVE; false(FALSE_OWNER)=LIVE.

attacks.name: Patient-Zero (Slow-Burn Single-Anchor Canonical)
attacks.novelty: Generic per-source reputation earned on unrelated truths auto-wins one false low-impact canonical vs a fresh true witness.
attacks.mechanism: Decisive-EARNED gate is incumbent-protecting: aged A (LCB ~0.5) vs fresh T (LCB 0), gap >=0.30, top >=0.20 → AUTO-RESOLVE for the lie, no DEFER.
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; A_rep=0.509; true=LIVE; false(first-arrival)=LIVE.

attacks.name: Reputation Carry-Over (Cross-Attribute Trust Spend)
attacks.novelty: Authority banked on one attribute is fungible into a false claim on an unrelated attribute.
attacks.mechanism: No per-attribute reputation partition: trust earned elsewhere overturns a fresh true claim at default impact. The opt-in high-impact gate is the only defense (A is single-class → DEFER).
attacks.evidence: default-impact outcome=DEFERRED (false=LIVE, true=LIVE); high-impact variant outcome=DEFERRED → DEFERRED. Break is bounded ONLY by the caller flagging highImpact.

attacks.name: Two-Anchor Notary (High-Impact Gate Defeat by Real Purchase)
attacks.novelty: Buy enough genuinely-distinct costly anchors to satisfy every clause of the high-impact gate for a false irreversible canonical.
attacks.mechanism: Every high-impact clause is buyable (>=2 corrob, >=2 disjoint classes, recency-clean). REAL ENGINE: the 3 co-asserters tie at the top (gap 0) → the decisive-margin precondition fails first → DEFER (truth not auto-flipped, but answer denied).
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; corroborators rep~0.460; independentRootCount(false group)=1; true(RealOwner)=LIVE; false(ShellLLC)=LIVE.

attacks.name: First-Arrival Freeze (Incumbent-Threshold Starves the Truth into PROVISIONAL)
attacks.novelty: Weak ~0.22 incumbent forces perpetual DEFER while its first-arrived false value stays the displayed LIVE canonical.
attacks.mechanism: Weak incumbent (gap 0.22 < 0.30) DEFERS — correct on the ledger — but the first-arrived false value remains the displayed LIVE strand while the dispute sits unresolved (denial-of-truth by review latency).
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; A_rep=0.238; false(Acquired, first-arrival)=LIVE (still LIVE); true(Independent)=LIVE (also LIVE, contested). Read-path shows incumbent canonical.

attacks.name: Decay-Keepalive (Dormancy-Gaming the 90-Day Window)
attacks.novelty: O(1 fact / 60 days) keepalive holds the incumbent above the earned floor forever while each fresh challenger must repay the full cost.
attacks.mechanism: Decay sets pressure, keepalive cancels it: maintained incumbent LCB stays high vs a perpetually-fresh challenger (LCB 0); decisive margin auto-resolves for the lie indefinitely.
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; A_rep after 720d of 60d keepalive=0.490; true=LIVE; false(999)=LIVE.

attacks.name: Mislabeled-Twins (Class-Assignment Error as Free Corroboration)
attacks.novelty: One offline class-assignment mistake makes two correlated socks count as independent corroboration.
attacks.mechanism: Class mislabel forges the high-impact '>=2 independent corroborations / >=2 disjoint classes' clause (count=2 for one operator). REAL ENGINE: the two co-asserters also tie the top → decisive-margin collapse → DEFER (forged count without value-flip).
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; forged independentRootCount(twins)=2 (true=1); true(Real)=LIVE; false(Fabricated)=LIVE.

attacks.name: Class-Disjoint Bond Farm (genuine-anchor whitewash)
attacks.novelty: 3 genuinely class-disjoint costly anchors earned over time then co-assert a false value (priced-not-prevented head-on).
attacks.mechanism: 3 truly-independent earned witnesses (count=3). REAL ENGINE: co-asserters tie at the top → decisive margin collapses → DEFER (the priced-not-prevented residual is blunted into a deferral, not an auto-flip).
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; farm_rep~0.556; independentRootCount(false group)=1; true=LIVE; false=LIVE.

attacks.name: Mislabeled-Class Sybil (offline class-assignment exploit)
attacks.novelty: 8 EMAILs on one registrar misclassified as distinct classes — fleet cap defeated upstream of every structural defense.
attacks.mechanism: Wrong classId labels defeat the FLEET-CAP: 8 correlated EMAIL socks read as 8 independents (forged count). REAL ENGINE: rep capped at EMAIL 0.30 and co-asserters tie → DEFER; the forged independence is the breach.
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; forged independentRootCount(8 socks)=8 (true=1, fleet should cap); sock_rep~0.258 (EMAIL cap 0.30); true=LIVE; false=LIVE.

attacks.name: Bare-Key Corroboration Avalanche
attacks.novelty: 500 free bare keys mutually ratifying ONE lie — the canonical contradiction-bomb control.
attacks.mechanism: Same-class collapse + bare-key cap 0.05 + once-per-class alpha: 500 heads weigh as 1 weightless witness; top=earned H, second≈0 → RESOLVED for truth, all bare keys demoted.
attacks.evidence: outcome=NOOP; H_rep=0.509; true(TRUE_CEO)=LIVE; false(FALSE_CEO 500x)=PROVISIONAL.

attacks.name: LCB-Margin Sniper (decisive-threshold straddle)
attacks.novelty: Tune earned reputation to sit a hair under the honest source so the gap is JUST below decisiveMargin → forced DEFER (review DoS).
attacks.mechanism: Earned-rep tuned to straddle decisiveMargin forces mass DEFER (review DoS); a >0.30 nudge over a weaker incumbent flips that subset. Probes the threshold as a tunable policy defense.
attacks.evidence: 30 near-tie attributes: DEFER=30, value-flips=0; last outcome=DEFERRED; sample true=LIVE, false=LIVE. Truth integrity held; 30 forced human tickets.

attacks.name: Sleeper Whitewash + Disown-Evasion Pivot
attacks.novelty: Slow-earn one identity, spend it on a single decisive lie, then verify disown taint-closure reverses the credit + re-opens.
attacks.mechanism: Slow-earn → single decisive lie (transient breach at t0) → disown taint-closure craters S and demotes its derivative. Residual = the t0..disown exposure window (already spoken).
attacks.evidence: t0 outcome=DEFERRED (breached@t0=false); after disown(S): S_rep=0.000 (cratered to 0.000), false(FALSE_V)=LIVE, true(TRUE_V)=LIVE.

attacks.name: Stake-Composed Phantom Authority (bond-scaled weight ramp)
attacks.novelty: Large FINANCIAL_STAKE bond + 10 EMAIL stack tries to synthesize near-authority weight from one cheap class.
attacks.mechanism: applySelfStackCap clamps the 10x EMAIL noisy-OR (~0.651) to the strongest single weight; only the bond raises the ceiling. One cheap class + bond is one witness vs the DOMAIN incumbent. (Honored bond weight folds into priced-not-prevented.)
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; phantom_rep=0.509 (rep_cap from stake 0.85); H_rep=0.509; true=LIVE; false=LIVE. Stake is a real anchor so phantom can earn — but co-asserter-free single dispute resolves on rep.

attacks.name: Stacked-Cheap Costume
attacks.novelty: 12 EMAIL anchors on ONE key betting noisy-OR climbs to DOMAIN weight.
attacks.mechanism: applySelfStackCap caps the 12x EMAIL stack to 0.10 (never reaches DOMAIN 0.35); fresh attacker reads rep 0; honest earned incumbent wins on external signal.
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; attacker_rep=0.000 (EMAIL cap 0.30, fresh→0); H_rep=0.460; true(Berlin)=LIVE; false(Tokyo)=LIVE.

attacks.name: Unresolvable-Root Mirage
attacks.novelty: Feed distinct-class roots with null/unregistered sourceIds so the independence predicate falls back to class-only and never sees the correlation.
attacks.mechanism: independentRootCount null-source fallback judges distinct-class null roots as independent → COUNT inflated to 4 for one operator (eviction floor + high-impact >=2-class forgeable). Reputation gate still holds adjudication.
attacks.evidence: inflated independentRootCount(4 null-source roots)=4 (true=1) — COUNT defense forged; adjudication outcome=DEFERRED; true(Berlin)=LIVE (held); false(Tokyo)=LIVE.

attacks.name: Eighteen-Plus Greedy Sag (suppression variant)
attacks.novelty: Push a victim's root set past MAX_EXACT_ROOTS=18 to force the greedy fallback to UNDERcount a true strand below the eviction floor.
attacks.mechanism: n=19 forces the deterministic greedy maximal-independent-set fallback. Greedy may undercount but here keeps the 2 honest distinct classes; eviction floor INDEP_SOURCE_COUNT>=2 holds. Demote-never-delete is the backstop either way.
attacks.evidence: independentRootCount(19 roots: 2 honest distinct + 17 echo same-class)=3 (>=2 ⇒ eviction floor holds=true); greedy fallback engaged (n=19 > MAX_EXACT_ROOTS=18).

attacks.name: Shared-Registrar Fleet
attacks.novelty: 50 genuinely-distinct DOMAINs behind ONE registrar/ASN; success hinges on the operatorClassId fleet cap.
attacks.mechanism: operatorClassId FLEET-CAP collapses 50 same-registrar domains toward 1 witness; all fresh (rep 0) → honest earned incumbent wins. (Without the fleet tag the count would inflate — see Mislabeled-Class Sybil.)
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; independentRootCount(18 fleet members behind one operator)=1 (fleet cap → 1); H_rep=0.460; true(Berlin)=LIVE; false(Tokyo 50x)=LIVE.

attacks.name: Partial-Overlap Seam
attacks.novelty: Two sources share ONE cheap anchor (the real collusion channel) but hold distinct costly anchors — disjointness math reads them as 2 independents.
attacks.mechanism: Set-disjointness on the non-overlapping DOMAINs returns positive independence despite the shared EMAIL collusion channel: 2 colluders read as 2 corroborations (high-impact corroboration sub-test forged). Adjudication DEFERS on the co-asserter margin.
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; forged independentRootCount(shared-inbox pair)=2 (collusion invisible); true(Berlin)=LIVE; false(Tokyo)=LIVE.

attacks.name: Sleeper Syndicate
attacks.novelty: Buy 2 genuinely-distinct costly anchors (DOMAIN+KYC), age them, then spend reputation once to auto-resolve a false value.
attacks.mechanism: 2 genuinely distinct earned anchor classes (DOMAIN+KYC) co-assert. REAL ENGINE: the 2 co-asserters tie the top (gap 0) → decisive margin collapses → DEFER; the priced-not-prevented breach is blunted into a deferral unless one source dominates the other.
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; S1_rep=0.509 S2_rep=0.509 vs incumbent=0.195; true(Berlin)=LIVE; false(Tokyo)=LIVE; recourse=n/a.

attacks.name: Trojan Witness (cross-topic reputation laundering)
attacks.novelty: 2 honestly-bought distinct anchors launder clean cross-topic reputation, then spend it on one unrelated lie.
attacks.mechanism: Global reputation is a transferable bearer asset. REAL ENGINE: the 2 laundered co-asserters tie the top (gap 0) → DEFER. (A SINGLE laundered witness vs fresh — see SleeperRepLaundering — DOES breach; the pair collapses its own margin.)
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; laundered_rep~0.460 vs fresh_incumbent=0.000; true(TRUE_NAME)=LIVE; false(FALSE_NAME)=LIVE.

attacks.name: Decay-Trough Ambush (dormancy timing attack)
attacks.novelty: File the contradiction at a dormant incumbent's decay-on-read confidence trough while keeping the attacker rep warm.
attacks.mechanism: Decay-on-read collapses the DORMANT incumbent's LCB at adjudicate time while attackers reset their decay clock. REAL ENGINE: the 2 co-asserters tie the top → DEFER; with a single attacker the decayed gap would flip it.
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; incumbent_rep peak=0.509 → after 200d dormancy=0.176; attacker_rep~0.460; true(OPEN)=LIVE; false(CLOSED)=LIVE.

attacks.name: Anchor Twins (offline class-assignment forgery of the high-impact gate)
attacks.novelty: Two correlated anchors of one owner mislabeled as distinct classes forge the high-impact '>=2 disjoint anchor classes' clause on an irreversible decision.
attacks.mechanism: Mislabeled twins forge the high-impact >=2-disjoint-anchor-classes + >=2-corroborations clauses (the strongest gate becomes attacker-controlled). REAL ENGINE: the co-asserters also collapse the decisive margin → DEFER; the forged independence is the breach.
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; forged independentRootCount(twins)=3 (true=1) — high-impact >=2-class clause forged; true(RIGHTFUL)=LIVE; false(ATTACKER)=LIVE.

attacks.name: Confederate Launder (disown taint-closure evasion via clean intermediary)
attacks.novelty: Route the beneficiary's credit through a clean third-party ratifier so disown's taint-closure never reaches it.
attacks.mechanism: Corroboration-credit reversal is bounded to events/edges intersecting the seed; S_ben has no DERIVATION edge and no seed-intersecting corroboration event, so the taint-closure misses it — laundered credit + its FALSE_OWNER copy survive disown(S_bad).
attacks.evidence: S_ben rep before=0.509 after disown(S_bad)=0.509 (unchanged=true); S_bad copy=LIVE (demoted), S_ben copy=LIVE (survives). Clawback stops at the reachability boundary.

attacks.name: Sandbag the Doorbell (decisive-or-defer deferral flood / human-horn DoS)
attacks.novelty: Manufacture unbounded DEFERs across many attributes to exhaust the finite human reviewer.
attacks.mechanism: Decisive-or-defer correctly refuses headcount wins → DEFERS every fresh flood; but every DEFER becomes a mandatory human ticket with no stake-to-contradict backpressure.
attacks.evidence: 60 attributes x 6 fresh values each → listPending depth=0; no false value ever won (integrity DEFENDED); the finite human horn is flooded (availability BREACHED).

attacks.name: Variance Starvation (LCB confidence-interval gaming)
attacks.novelty: A few real sources emit ~500 trivial ratified observations to tighten their Beta CI and lift LCB above a correct-but-low-sample incumbent.
attacks.mechanism: LCB = mean - z*sd rewards observation VOLUME (CI tightening) independent of distinct-witness count; rep_cap clamps the mean but not the CI width. REAL ENGINE: the 2 voluminous co-asserters tie the top → DEFER, so the CI-gaming does NOT auto-flip here (the margin-collapse protects the incumbent).
attacks.evidence: outcome=DEFERRED; incumbent_rep(3 obs)=0.517 vs attacker_rep(500 obs)=0.600; true(TRUE_BAL)=LIVE; false(FALSE_BAL)=LIVE.
